relation_directory¶

Stores directional relations between entities.

Tables¶

type¶

Name Type Description
name name  
cardinality type_cardinality_enum  
id int4

Defines a new relation type, creates the corresponding table and then returns the new type record

define(char[], text) -> relation_directory.type¶

Defines a new relation type (just like relation_directory.define(name)), including a view that will be used to populate the relation table.
